center.name: 第勒尼安海
center.summary: 第勒尼安海是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Moltoni's warbler，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This species is native to Italy and islands of the Tyrrhenian Sea

links.evidence: This species is native to Italy and islands of the Tyrrhenian Sea
